title: salix × dalecarlica
intro: Salix × dalecarlica, also known as the Swedish aspen, is a hybrid species of willow, derived from the crossing of two Salix species. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of salicin, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Salix × dalecarlica include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Salix × dalecarlica are typically made into teas, infusions, or salves, and are used to treat a range of ailments, from arthritis to skin conditions.
